hooks.command: bash -c 'file_path=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".file_path // empty"); if [[ -n "$file_path" && "$file_path" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$ ]]; then cd /workspace/frontend && echo "🎨 Auto-formatting $file_path" && npx prettier --write "$file_path" && echo "🔧 Running ESLint fixes" && npm run lint:fix -- "$file_path" --quiet && echo "🔍 TypeScript type checking" && npx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck && echo "✅ All checks passed for $file_path"; fi'
